task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "获取用户输入的搜索目录路径"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "递归查找指定目录下的所有音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "加载音频文件并提取元数据"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "计算音频文件的均方根能量（RMS）"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "检测音频文件的潜在问题（低采样率、短时长、低音量）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "输出音频文件的基本信息和问题提示"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "获取用户输入的音频文件路径"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "加载音频文件并准备分段"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "按静音分割音频文件"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "保存分段后的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "初始化语音识别引擎"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "逐段执行语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "生成带时间戳的文本内容"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "保存识别结果为文本文件"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "保存识别结果为SRT字幕文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "inputDirectory"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "audioFilesFound"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "extractSignal"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "analyzeEnergy"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "reportIssues"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "inputAudioFile"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "prepareSplitting"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "saveChunks"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "initializeEngine"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "startRecognition"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "generateTimestampedText"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveAsText"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsSRT"}]}
